caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design is standing indoors, likely giving a presentation or speech. He appears to be engaged in explaining something, as he gestures with his hands for emphasis. In the first image, he is looking down, possibly at notes or a device, while in the second image, he raises his right hand to his ear, perhaps adjusting an earpiece or emphasizing a point. His left hand is also raised, indicating active communication. The setting seems to be a professional or academic environment, suggested by the lanyard around his neck and the plain background.
